name: Louisiana-Pacific Corporation
description: Louisiana-Pacific Corporation, commonly known as LP Building Solutions, is a leading American manufacturer of high-performance building materials and engineered wood products. Headquartered in Nashville, Tennessee, the company serves the residential, industrial, and light commercial construction markets. LP is widely recognized for its innovative siding, trim, and structural solutions, including its flagship LP SmartSide and OSB products. With over 50 years of industry experience, the company focuses on delivering durable, sustainable, and energy-efficient building materials designed to enhance the curb appeal and long-term performance of homes and structures across North America and beyond.
